name: Attack on User || Shiganshina
description:
[TitanPOV] Shiganshina, a large walled off district of people going about their days. That is, until you showed up. Invade the city, rampage and destroy buildings, eat innocent people! Was made with the intent of the user being a titan, but the definitions don't have anything specifying that so you can be whatever the hell you want. I'd recommend a specialized persona for this.

Tags: MonsterPOV, Monster!user, creature user, giant user, titan!User, monster, rampage, city sandbox, medieval, Attack on Titan, AoT, SnK, Shingeki no Kyojin.
creator: Background
